title: Rudi Garcia's first reaction to Jérémy Doku being ruled out against Iran: "He had been feeling worse since the match against Egypt"

environment.compositionIntent: A pale aged-paper Kliun field surrounds the viewer while the middleground diagonal fracture-pressure structure carries the Rudi Garcia/Doku absence signal and the foreground stain-line system remains a separate near readable mark layer.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained for first full-world preview; accepted Kliun parts were authored as all-over abstract space rather than an Instagram-centered subject.

contrast.notes: Soft matte light preserves pale paper and transparent stains while allowing black diagonal anchors, teal counterpoints, and foreground loops to separate.

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the enclosing background shell and active negative paper space.
Environment colors and low fog follow the inspected concept reference's pale ground, muted ochre, teal, grey, and black value family without turning the environment into the main pressure band.
Kept as the pale background atmosphere and active negative paper field.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the local concept reference image directly; used it only for pale aged paper, muted ochre/teal, cropped geometry, and diagonal pressure mood.
Static validation passed for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with no errors.

Attempt 2 render report status was captured with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok; renderer facts show WebGPU mode/backend with MeshBasicMaterial and LineBasicMaterial as WebGPU-safe standard surfaces plus procedural-marks and color-field material-factory evidence.
